title: roldana tonii
intro: Roldana tonii, also known as Mexican mint or tonii, is a perennial herb native to Mexico and parts of the United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it effective against various infections and skin conditions. The health benefits of Roldana tonii include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce fever, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and fight off viruses. Roldana tonii is typically prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or it can be made into a tincture or salve for topical use.
